title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Kid, King as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Dragon Salmon's stomach- its most tender part- is particularly sensitive to a knife's blade!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To open it successfully requires a perfectly straight singular cut. You can't be off by even a millimeter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The slightest hesitation or waiver of the blade and pop! The fish's natural defenses make it burst like a balloon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Exploding all its delicious flesh into useless scraps.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there! HA4! Get how hard it is now, kid?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not that I could do it either, no matter how many times I tried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Then why the AtTI- Tude?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, he has to do it in a single cut...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...When the fish is that long and wiggly?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huh. In that case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...how about this knife?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow! That one is way longer than that other one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I can totally see that working!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Right? This is a Yang/ba knife.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a tool specifically designed for cutting fish for sushi and sashimi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A firm but gentle pull of the long, sharp blade from hilt to tip...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...will slice the flesh cleanly ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Cutting the fibers without crushing them or letting any tasty juices escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch! With this knife I'll be able to-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Damn it! Again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oh boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen Sanji look so scary in the kitchen before.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know you said it was, but I had no idea it was THAT HARD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Stop ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Just stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Quit trying already! It's over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was in over my head from the start with this dragon salmon idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hey, wait! Don't give up yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji is trying his best for your daughter...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some things are just plain impossible. Better to give up with grace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's for your daughter, right?! Who you care about a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bet I do! She...she's way too precious a treasure for a dad like me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was so busy with work I never did much for her when she was growing up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Swift, I'm not sure if I'm

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: See... she was a frail little girl.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Got sick real bad more times than I can count.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 36 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
